title: senecio × bohemicus
intro: Senecio × bohemicus, also known as Jacob's Ladder, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the daisy family and is a cross between Senecio cerefolium and Jacobaea maritima. Traditionally, Jacob's Ladder has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and anxiety, and its ability to boost the immune system. Jacob's Ladder can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
